title: What's new in Cloud Run
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates new Cloud Run capabilities for deploying AI agents and inference workloads on a serverless platform. The session covers features for scaling applications seamlessly while reducing operational overhead to support AI-driven development.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session demonstrates new Cloud Run capabilities aimed at deploying AI agents and inference workloads on a serverless platform. It covers features for scaling applications while reducing operational overhead, which matters as AI-driven development pushes more inference and agent workloads onto managed infrastructure. The key takeaways center on serverless deployment, local inference, and auto-scaling for these workloads.
